candidates.why: Operational revenue is a core revenue line; may represent main operating sales separate from other revenue.
This is only a rounding adjustment, not the true revenue figure; should not be primary but can appear as an ancillary line.
Clearly labeled as the aggregate operating revenue; best single top-line revenue measure.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income from interests in associated companies
candidates.why: Income from associates, not core sales; excluded from REVT.
Interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.

variables.notes: Total operating revenue is the main top-line; Operational revenue is kept as a fallback historical label.

candidates.why: Direct material and consumable costs closely match cost of goods sold / cost of sales.
Includes employee costs, possibly both production and overhead; less clearly direct COGS only.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly SG&A-related, not COGS.
Likely SG&A/overhead, not direct COGS.
General operating/rental overhead, not direct COGS.
By definition SG&A, not COGS.
Financial result, not COGS.
Financial, not production costs.
Aggregate finance result, not COGS.
Non-recurring items, not ongoing COGS.
Inventory component, a balance sheet item, not period COGS.
Liability accrual, not directly COGS.
Liability accrual, not directly COGS.

variables.notes: Raw materials and consumables best represents direct cost of sales; other candidates are SG&A or non-operating.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation component; clearly overhead.
Typical SG&A/overhead bucket excluding COGS and D&A.
Explicit SG&A line (even if currently empty in preview); captures SG&A when reported this way.
Residual operating overhead category; fits SG&A-type costs.
Alternative SG&A label, likely used in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A component and bucket lines are included, excluding any totals or COGS/D&A/impairment items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Only explicit P&L line tied directly to R&D; although it is amortization, it is the best available proxy for R&D-related expense.
Capitalized development asset, not a period expense.
Balance sheet gross capitalized R&D, not current expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization on the balance sheet, not current-period P&L.
Balance sheet-supporting amortization; less direct than the income statement R&D amortization line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: There is no clear total R&D expense line; the R&D-specific amortization expense is used as the closest available R&D-related cost.

candidates.row_label: Income from interests in associated companies
candidates.why: Equity income from associates, not interest on debt.
Primary net finance cost line; best proxy for interest expense when detailed split exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; specific part of total interest expense.
Earnings attribution, not interest.
Earnings attribution, not interest.
Generic interest expense line, possibly used in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; secondary label for lease interest costs.
Debt balance, not expense.
Accrued interest liability, not full-period expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity component, not interest.
Equity component, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Net interest expense is used as the primary interest cost; additional specific interest expense lines are provided as fallbacks for different reporting periods.

candidates.why: Tax item affecting equity, not total book equity itself.
Income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Component of equity, not total equity; preferable to use the aggregate total for BE.
Alias/component of equity, not the total.
Total equity amount; equals total shareholders equity here and represents book equity.
Explicit total equity attributable to shareholders; duplicates Total Equity but is clearly shareholder-focused.

variables.notes: Total shareholders equity represents equity attributable to the company’s shareholders; minority interests are reported separately and set under MIB.

candidates.row_label: Income from interests in associated companies
candidates.why: Equity method income from associates, not minority interest in equity.
P&L attribution of profit to minorities, not the balance sheet equity amount.
Same as above; income attribution, not equity balance.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for MIB if populated.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; kept as fallback.

variables.notes: Minority Interests (and its singular variant) on the balance sheet represent non-controlling interests to be added to equity in the PROF denominator.
